howItWorks.title: How Scambo Works
howItWorks.subtitle: The easiest photo contest in Brazil. Submit, pay, and compete for prizes every month.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Click Create Post and upload your photo. You also choose the amount you want to pay — the higher the amount, the bigger the prize!
howItWorks.step2Desc: After submitting your photo, you're redirected to payment. Pay via Pix (QR Code or copy and paste) or credit card through Mercado Pago. Payment is processed instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: As soon as payment is approved, your photo appears on the monthly ranking. You can track your position in real time and see how many people have entered.
howItWorks.step4Desc: At the end of the month, first place takes the total prize. The amount includes 100% of what you paid + 50% of the total from all other posts. The more people participate, the bigger the prize!
howItWorks.prizeExplanation: The prize works simply and transparently. Say you enter with R$ 50 and 5 other people enter with amounts totaling R$ 300. The prize calculation for first place is:
howItWorks.prizeFormula: Prize = R$ 50 (your amount) + 50% of R$ 300 = R$ 50 + R$ 150 = R$ 200
howItWorks.prizeDetail: In other words, you get back the amount you paid + half the total amount from other participants. This means everyone contributes to the winner's prize, and the prize grows the more people participate.
howItWorks.benefit1: Payment via Pix — approved in seconds
howItWorks.benefit4: Easy and fast: takes less than 2 minutes to enter
howItWorks.benefit5: Hall of Fame for each month's champions
howItWorks.ctaText: Ready to participate? This month's ranking is already open!

items.a: Scambo is an online photo contest where you submit your photo, pay an amount via Pix, appear on a public ranking, and compete for cash prizes at the end of the month. First place gets the amount they paid + 50% of the total from all other posts.

It's simple: go to the Create Post page, upload your photo, choose the amount you want to pay (minimum R$ 5), fill in your details, and complete the payment via Pix. Once payment is approved, your photo appears on the ranking.

items.q: How much does it cost to participate?
items.a: The minimum amount is R$ 5. You can choose any amount above that. The higher the amount you pay, the larger the total monthly prize — since 50% of each participant's amount goes to the first place prize.

First place on the ranking gets 100% of the amount they paid back + 50% of the sum of all other posts for the month. For example: if you paid R$ 50 and other participants totaled R$ 300, you win R$ 50 + R$ 150 = R$ 200.

items.q: How do I receive the prize if I win?
items.a: The prize payment is made via Pix to the Pix key you registered when creating your post. The organizer contacts you and transfers the amount directly to your account.
We accept payment via Pix (QR Code or copy and paste) and credit card processed by Mercado Pago. Pix is the fastest method — approval is instant.

items.q: Can I participate more than once in the same month?
items.a: Yes, you can create as many posts as you want. Each post is a separate entry on the ranking with its own amount.

items.q: What happens at the end of the month?
items.a: On the last day of the month, the ranking is automatically closed. First place is declared the winner and enters the Hall of Fame. Other participants' photos are archived, and a new ranking starts the following month.
Yes. Your Pix key, phone number, and password are never publicly exposed. Only your username and photo appear on the ranking. All data is securely stored in Supabase.

items.q: Can I report an inappropriate photo or conduct?
items.a: All photos go through automatic format and security validation. Inappropriate photos can be removed by administrators. If you find something inappropriate, please contact us.
